{{Quote|You would prefer that I took a little pleasure, a little sustenance, at your expense rather than theirs? I was promised, little key tapper. I was promised, and I have yet to receive the payment for those things that only I can do. You remember that there are many hours in a day, and only half of them are hours of light.|Dzym to [[Liegeus Vorn]]|<ref name="Planet of Twilight">''[[Planet of Twilight]]''</ref>}}
'''Dzym''' was a genetically altered [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Droch/Legends|Droch]] from [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]]. He was grown from his small insectoid form to take the appearance and height of a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]]. He conspired with [[Seti Ashgad/Legends|Seti Ashgad]] and nearly invaded the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] with his fellow drochs, but was stopped by the [[Tsil]] and [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|And at heart he doesn't really care. All he wants is to get off this planet, into more fertile worlds.|[[Callista Ming]] to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]|<ref name="Planet of Twilight" />}}
Dzym was a [[Droch/Legends|droch]] genetically altered by [[Beldorion]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] cook as a treat for the Hutt to eat. He became [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] and killed the cook. In cahoots with [[Seti Ashgad/Legends|Seti Ashgad]], he plotted to take drochs off [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]], thus devastating [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], and providing himself eternal feeding grounds.

He along with Ashgad kidnapped [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and held her hostage for a while. Dzym also helped maintain Ahsgad's youthful appearance. After Leia's escape, Dzym tortured the man responsible for Leia, named [[Liegeus Vorn|Liegeus]]. During the torture [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] attacked Dzym, who used the little force powers he had (as a [[Droch/Legends|Droch]] he had slowly taken life-energy from [[Beldorion]] and gained some force sensitivity) to hold the weakened jedi master and escape him. 

He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during the attempt to launch off-world by the local population, who had been influenced by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. At his death, Dzym was two hundred and fifty years old.

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|I heard you and Dzym talking, that is, but I couldn't hear what you said. Only the way you shrank away, the way you fear him.|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] to [[Liegeus Vorn]]|<ref name="Planet of Twilight" />}}
Despite his appearance as a gaunt [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]], without his robe, he was decidedly [[Alien/Legends|alien]]. His torso and fingertips were covered in razor-sharp toothed orifices. He had the same ability to leech life as other droch beetles, and in one instance ate one of the larger crab-like drochs, describing the flavor as "sweet."
